ham.subject: Your AcmeCRM Subscription is Expiring Soon – Renew Now
ham.body:
Hi Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the recent updates to AcmeCRM. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription will expire on 30‑June‑2026.

To continue uninterrupted service, simply click the link below to renew at your convenience. If you have any questions, our support team is ready to assist.

Renew now: <URL>

Thank you for choosing AcmeCRM!

Best regards,
The AcmeCRM Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear John,

We have detected a critical issue with your payroll account that requires your immediate attention. Please verify your bank details and confirm your recent salary disbursement by logging into the HR portal within 24 hours. Failure to comply may result in delayed payments and possible account suspension.

Click here to update: <URL>

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Human Resources Team
